outputs.description: Result of archive_path existence check and SHA256 validation

schema.archive_path: string — relative path of archive_path from source_manifest
schema.archive_path_exists: boolean — whether the file exists at REPO_ROOT / archive_path
schema.sha256_actual: string | null — computed SHA256 of archive_path file; null if file missing

outputs.description: Focused SHA256 checksum record with file size

schema.file_size_bytes: integer | null — size of archive_path file; null if missing

outputs.description: Complete deterministic file inventory of extracted_path

schema.file_count: integer — actual number of files found via rglob
schema.registered_file_count: integer | null — file_count from source_manifest if declared
schema.file_count_match: boolean — true if file_count == registered_file_count (or if no registered count)
schema.files: array[{path: string, size_bytes: integer}] — sorted list of all files relative to source_root

outputs.description: Summary manifest for the intake run — overall result and all key metadata

schema.intake_result: string — PASS | FAIL (PASS only if both boundary and inventory PASS)

create_only_rule: In write mode, all 4 output files are checked for existence before any write. If any file already exists, script exits with FAIL-CLOSED. Existing intake artifacts are never overwritten.

path_conventions.client_id_source: client_id CLI argument — must match clients/<client_id>/client.yaml
path_conventions.no_uuid_path_for_output: Outputs are written to the slug path (clients/<client_id>/...), consistent with run_client_pipeline.py conventions. Source artifacts (archive_path, extracted_path) may reference UUID paths as registered in source_manifest.json.
path_conventions.no_filesystem_search: All paths resolved deterministically from client_id, source_id, run_id arguments and source_manifest.json fields. No glob or filesystem discovery for path resolution.
